[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011010 4
1 0111000 3
2 1010111 5
3 0111101 5
4 1001001 3
5 1110110 5
6 0011011 4
7 1111111 a

01 10 1011111 6
12 21 0011011 4 match 6
23 32 0110111 5

56 65 1111101 6
67 76 1011011 5
70 07 1011111 6

35 53 1111111 a match 7
